case_title: GILBERT SOTIO VS. HYPO HYPO et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOTIO, GILBERT AND COMIE SOTIO BY AND THROUGH GUARDIAN AD LITEM GILBERT SOTIO SERVED NOV-16-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KYAUKSEINNLWIN, MOEKYAW
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR APR-21-2014. FEB-19-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF GILBERT SOTIO AND CONNIE SOTIO'S MOTION TO STRIKE DEFENDANTS' ANSWER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT. ON JANUARY 15, 2014, DEFENDANTS FILED AN AMENDED VERIFIED ANSWER. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED.

PROOF OF SERVICE OF ORDER GRANTING ATTORNEY'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL: PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR REED, NIKOLAUS W. AS ATTORNEY FOR SOTIO, GILBERT AND COMIE SOTIO BY AND THROUGH GUARDIAN AD LITEM GILBERT SOTIO SOTIO, COMIE

DISCOVERY 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS HPYO HPYO AND MOEKYAW KYAUKSEINNLWIN'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF TO APPEAR FOR ORAL DEPOSITION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL APPEAR FOR DEPOSITION QUESTIONING ON A DATE TO BE RESET BY AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES, PURSUANT TO FORMAL NOTICE. THE DEPOSITION MUST BE COMPLETED WITHIN 60 DAYS OF THE DATE OF SERVICE OF THIS ORDER. MONETARY SANCTIONS ARE DENIED BASED ON DEFENDANT'S INADEQUATE NOTICE AS MANDATED BY CCP SECTION 2023.040. DEFENDANT SHALL PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WITH NOTICE OF ENTRY AND SHALL SERVE SAME ON THE PLAINTIFF WITHIN TWENTY DAYS OF THE DATE OF THIS DECISION. JUDGE PRO TEM STEVEN STEIN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-17-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-29-2015 Off Calendar

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2015 Set For Case Management Conference On Jun-17-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-17-2014 Continued To Apr-21-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Gilbert Sotio, Plaintiff; appearance by Christopher Patton, Esq. for Defendant. The jurisdiction of the arbitrator is extended through MAR-16-2015. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to APR-21-2015 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported.

Mtn To Compel Depo
Off Calendar Jun-17-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Christopher Patton, Esq., 510.835.3400, for defendants Hpyo Hpyo and Moekyaw Kyaukseinnlwin; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs HPYO HPYO and MOEKYAW KYAUKSEINNLWIN's Motion to compel plaintiff to appear for oral deposition is granted. Plaintiff shall appear for deposition questioning on a date to be reset by agreement of the parties, pursuant to formal notice. The deposition must be completed within 60 days of the date of service of this Order. Monetary sanctions are denied based on defendant's inadequate notice as mandated by CCP section 2023.040. Defendant shall prepare a proposed Order with Notice of Entry and shall serve same on the plaintiff within twenty days of the date of this decision. Judge Pro Tem Steven Stein, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, not reported.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jun-04-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nikolaus Reed, Esq., 415.940.7766, for moving party.
Plaintiff Gilbert Sotio is also present in court.

RULING: Matter discussed. The Court vacated its tentative ruling. NIKOLAUS W. REED, Esq.'s motion to be relieved as counsel of record for plaintiffs Gilbert Sotio and Comie Sotio is GRANTED. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

ARBITRATOR JURISDICTION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Oct-23-2014 Set For Order To Show Cause On Dec-16-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO ARBITRATION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar May-02-2014 Set To Order To Arbtitration Calendar

ASSIGN TO ARBITRATION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Apr-21-2014 Select Panel Of Arbitrators

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2014 Assigned To Arbitration On Apr-21-14

MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-13-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF GILBERT SOTIO AND CONNIE SOTIO'S MOTION TO STRIKE DEFENDANTS' ANSWER TO COMPLAINT is Off calendar as moot. On January 15, 2014, Defendants filed an Amended Verified Answer. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/EHG)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-22-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: CHRIS TATTON, ESQ., 510.835.3400, FOR DEFENDANTS HYPO HYPO AND MOEKYAW KYAUKSEINNLWIN; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs HPYO HPYO and MOEKYAW KYAUKSEINNLWIN's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is granted without leave to amend. The cited allegations (paragraphs 19-32) are totally irrelevant to plaintiff's complaint for personal injury as the result of a car accident. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976
